sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35744" key="e)niyhfi/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνιψηφίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n35744.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put to the vote,</tr_> Maiuri<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">NuovaSilloge</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">443</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
